notes: Practical single-GPU Llama pair for current framework. Requires HF access.

name: llama2_7b_to_70b
notes: 10x size gap. Heavy exploratory pair; Colab/A100 or multi-GPU preferred. Requires HF access.

notes: 5.38x size gap. Higher-acceptance but heavier draft exploratory pair. Requires HF access.

notes: 8.75x size gap. Very heavy exploratory pair for A100-class hardware. Requires HF access.

notes: Experimental cross-series Llama pair. Likely vocab-compatible (128256 vs 128256), but requires runtime compatibility check and HF access.

name: gemma2_2b_to_9b
notes: Strong single-family larger-target pair for Colab/A100. Requires HF access and runtime compatibility check.

name: gemma2_2b_to_27b
notes: Same-family Gemma 2 large-target pair. Requires Google Gemma access; useful for testing whether high target cost improves distributed SD speedup.

name: llama32_1b_to_31_70b
notes: Heavy cross-series Llama pair for A100-class hardware. Intended for 1B->70B exploratory testing.

name: qwen25_7b_to_14b
notes: 2x size gap; acceptance-oriented heavy-draft dense pair.

name: qwen25_7b_to_32b

name: qwen25_7b_to_72b
notes: 10.3x size gap; very heavy-draft dense pair intended for 4-bit target experiments on A100-class hardware.

name: gemma4_e2b_to_e4b
notes: Small same-family Gemma 4 base-model pair to estimate upper-bound acceptance with minimal target cost.

name: gemma4_e2b_to_26b_a4b
notes: Primary Gemma 4 exploratory base-model pair. MoE target activates about 3.8B parameters and may be attractive for speculative verify.

name: gemma4_e4b_to_26b_a4b
notes: Heavier-draft base-model comparison against the 26B A4B MoE target to trade draft cost for acceptance.

name: gemma4_e2b_to_31b
notes: Dense large-target Gemma 4 base-model pair to compare against the 26B A4B MoE target on acceptance and speedup.

name: gemma4_e4b_to_31b
notes: Heavier-draft dense-target Gemma 4 base-model pair for acceptance-oriented comparison.

name: llama31_drafter340m_to_8b
notes: Community-trained tiny drafter against Llama-3.1-8B. Requires HF access to Meta Llama and runtime compatibility check.

name: llama31_drafter500m_to_8b
notes: Community-trained tiny drafter against Llama-3.1-8B. Uses target tokenizer override. Requires HF access to Meta Llama and runtime compatibility check.

name: llama31_drafter500m_from32_1b_to_8b
notes: Community-trained 500M drafter initialized from Llama-3.2-1B and aligned to Llama-3.1-8B. Uses target tokenizer override. Requires HF access to Meta Llama and runtime compatibility check.

name: qwen25_1p5b_to_32b_4bit
notes: 21.3x size gap; intended for 4-bit target experiments. Run this pair with --target_quant nf4 or fp4 rather than dense target loading.

name: qwen3_1p7b_to_8b
notes: Qwen3 same-family medium target pair to compare against heavier 14B/32B targets under a stronger 1.7B draft.

name: qwen3_1p7b_to_32b_4bit
notes: Large-target Qwen3 pair intended for 4-bit target experiments. Use with --target_quant nf4 or fp4.
